title: Triple Baka Blazes
description: This texture pack replaces Blazes with the members of the Triple Baka song.
body:
This texture pack replaces Blazes with the members of the Triple Baka song.
There are three versions available:
One that only replaces the Breezes.
Another that only replaces the Blazes.
And Another that replaces both.

It only works with the most stable version of Optifine or with the ETF & EMF mods.
And it should work on versions later and lower than the current one. If not, please send a message on our Discord.
